summary: A short profile of Andrej Karpathy for the TIME100 AI 2024 list, highlighting his dual impact as a leading AI researcher at OpenAI and Tesla, and as a highly influential AI educator. It introduces his new venture, Eureka Labs, which aims to create an AI-native educational experience.

principles.statement: Get to the core of things to find the simplest explanations for complex issues.
principles.rationale: A physics education trains you to strip away unnecessary complexity and understand the fundamental truths of a subject, making it easier to teach and build from scratch.
principles.source_quote: I’m a little bit obsessed with coming to the core of things,

mental_models.name: Physics Education Lens
mental_models.description: Using the analytical approach of physics to break down highly intricate subjects into their simplest, most fundamental explanations.
mental_models.example: Explaining how to build smaller versions of GPT from scratch to a YouTube audience of millions.

mental_models.name: AI-Native Education
mental_models.description: A new paradigm for schooling where course material is designed by a human expert but guided and delivered by an AI teaching assistant.
mental_models.example: The foundational model for his new venture, Eureka Labs, starting with an undergraduate-level course on AI.

signature_quotes.text: I’m a little bit obsessed with coming to the core of things,
signature_quotes.context: Explaining his approach to breaking down complex AI topics into simple explanations.

signature_quotes.text: People are obviously pre-money if they’re trying to learn a lot of stuff. So I get paid in people thanking me.
signature_quotes.context: Discussing his motivation for providing free, high-quality educational content to the public.
